title: Aura blossom
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Plant |image=[[File:AuraBlossoms-TCOTT.png]] |name=Aura blossoms
as represented by Wisties |designation= |class=[[Flower/Legends|Flower]]{{CSWECite|I|48|aura blossom}} |origin=[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] |found= |habitat=[[Forest/Legends|Forests]] |lifespan= |description=*[[Color/Legends|Indigo-blue]] *[[Bioluminescence/Legends|Bioluminescent]] |edible= |inedible= |nutrition= |effects= |affiliation= }} {{Dialogue|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka|''Gunda'', Wicket! You found the aura blossoms!|Wicket Wystri Warrick|''[Laughs]'' At least the drought left us a few. They'll make great decorations for the Festival of Hoods tomorrow night.|Teebo|Oh! They're not aura blossoms. They're fire folk.|attr=The Ewoks mistake Wisties for aura blossoms|audio=AuraBlossoms-Ewoks.flac|src={{Ewoks|The Cries of the Trees}}}} '''Aura blossoms''' were an exquisite [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Color/Legends|indigo-blue]], [[Bioluminescence/Legends|bioluminescent]] [[Flower/Legends|flower]] that grew in abundance on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They were a favorite of the native [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] population. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]—which include the mention of aura [[Flower/Legends|blossoms]] in the episode "[[The Cries of the Trees]]"—to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. following [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of drought on Endor, the young Ewoks [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] were tasked by [[Bozzie]] to find aura blossoms for decorating the [[Festival of Hoods]]. After tumbling down a hill, Warrick found a group of [[Wistie/Legends|Wisties]]—diminutive, bioluminescent beings—which [[Gender/Legends|he]] mistook for aura blossoms. Teebo pointed out Warrick's error, and the Wisties took flight. ==Behind the scenes== Aura blossoms were first mentioned in "[[The Cries of the Trees]]," the pilot episode of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]. The episode was written by [[Paul Dini]] and premiered on [[September 7]], [[1985]].{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} ==Appearances== *{{Ewoks|The Cries of the Trees}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Aura blossom }} [[Category:Flowers]] [[Category:Plants of Endor]]
